title: doria
intro: Doria plant, also known as Cordia myxa, is a deciduous tree native to tropical and subtropical regions, belonging to the Bignoniaceae family. The doria plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of the doria plant include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of the doria plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote overall well-being.
